subject: ASAP: Scala Developer – Scala
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Byteshop
ROLE: Mid Scala Developer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Malmö / hybrid
RATE: 800 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Scala, Docker and MySQL.

Key requirements:
• Scala
• Docker
• MySQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Therese Magnusson
Staffing Coordinator
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 76 344 56 78
